Landing.title: Automate RFPs with AI
Landing.subtitle: Stop answering the same security questions. Upload your knowledge base and let our AI handle the rest.

Setup.title: Knowledge Library
Setup.subtitle: Upload your company's security documents, previous RFPs, and policies. The AI will securely index them for your organization to generate highly accurate answers.
Setup.error_upload: Failed to upload file. Please try again.

Respond.title: RFP Auto-Filler
Respond.subtitle: Upload a CSV with a "Question" column. The AI will search your Knowledge Library and generate an accurate response with references for every row.
Respond.no_questions: No questions found. Check that your CSV has a "Question" column.

History.title: Generation History
History.subtitle: View and download past questionnaires and generated responses for your organization.

Team.title: Team Management
Team.subtitle: Manage your organization's members, invitations, and roles.
